tributario-pe.name: Tax PE
tributario-pe.description: Experts in Peruvian tax law: VAT (IGV), Income Tax, SUNAT, RUC.
tributario-pe.longDescription: Collaborative knowledge base with 5 specialists in Peruvian taxation. Full coverage of tax regimes: RUC, RER, NRUS, MYPE Tax Regime, and General Regime.

knowledge.iva: El IGV en Perú es 18% (16% IGV + 2% IPM). Aplica a la mayoría de bienes y servicios excepto los exonerados del Apéndice I y II del TUO de la Ley del IGV.
knowledge.renta-cuarta: Las rentas de cuarta categoría (trabajo independiente) tributan como renta del trabajo. Deducción especial: 20% sobre la renta bruta hasta 24 UIT, más 7 UIT de deducción adicional. Tasas progresivas 8% a 30% según TUO Ley Impuesto a la Renta.
knowledge.renta-quinta: Las rentas de quinta categoría (trabajo dependiente) tributan con deducción de 7 UIT y tasas progresivas 8% a 30%. Las gratificaciones de julio y diciembre están inafectas.
knowledge.rer: El Régimen Especial de Renta (RER) permite tributar 1.5% sobre los ingresos netos mensuales. Topes: ingresos anuales ≤S/525,000 y activos fijos ≤S/126,000.
knowledge.nrus: El Nuevo RUS (NRUS) tiene dos categorías: hasta S/8,000/mes (cuota S/20) y hasta S/30,000/mes (cuota S/50). Solo personas naturales con negocios pequeños.
knowledge.default: La consulta tributaria que mencionas requiere análisis por un experto certificado de la tribu Tributario PE. Consulta validada con la legislación peruana vigente.

data-science-es.name: Data Science ES
data-science-es.description: ML, Python, statistics, and data analysis for the Spanish-speaking market.
data-science-es.longDescription: Team of 3 data scientists specialized in applied machine learning, statistical analysis, and data engineering best practices for projects in LATAM and Spain.

knowledge.default: Consulta de data science en español procesada. La tribu Data Science ES sugiere validar el approach con el repo público de la comunidad.

legal-mx.name: Legal MX
legal-mx.description: Mexican corporate and tax law. SAT, IMSS, contracts, SAS.
legal-mx.longDescription: Four Mexican lawyers and accountants covering corporate, tax, and labor law. Specialized in company formation, employment contracts, and SAT compliance.

knowledge.default: Mexican legal query routed to Legal MX tribe. Cross-checked with current SAT, IMSS, and corporate-law sources.

healthtech-bo.name: HealthTech BO
healthtech-bo.description: Bolivian medical protocols, generic medications, and clinical guidelines.
healthtech-bo.longDescription: Six Bolivian healthcare professionals documenting Ministry of Health protocols, essential medicines lists, and clinical guidelines adapted to the Bolivian context.

knowledge.default: Healthcare query routed to HealthTech BO tribe. Cross-checked with Bolivian Ministry of Health protocols.

defi-ar.name: DeFi AR
defi-ar.description: DeFi, crypto, and digital asset taxes in Argentina. AFIP, CEDEARs.
defi-ar.longDescription: Four Argentine specialists in decentralized finance covering yield farming, AFIP crypto taxes, exchanges, and the crypto ecosystem under the Argentine regulatory framework.

knowledge.default: Crypto/DeFi query routed to DeFi AR tribe. Cross-checked with current AFIP regulations and major Argentine exchanges.

edutech-co.name: EduTech CO
edutech-co.description: Colombian pedagogical methodologies, MEN curriculum, and educational gamification.
edutech-co.longDescription: Three Colombian educators specialized in pedagogical innovation, curriculum design under MEN guidelines, and educational technology for schools and universities in Colombia.

knowledge.default: Education query routed to EduTech CO tribe. Cross-checked with current MEN guidelines and Colombian pedagogical sources.
